title: Emoji Mod
description:
⚠ OUTDATED ⚠

This mod allows you to send utf emojis to chat easily!
body:
## ⚠ OUTDATED ⚠ - this mod will no longer receive any updates or support ### Emoji Mod allows you to send standard minecraft (utf) emojis easily. For example: if you write to the chat ":sword:", then a picture of a sword will be sent to the chat.

To find emojis, just start your message in chat with `:`, and poput will appear with the list of emojis! If you have questions, then you can ask them here!

## This mod is client side only
